summary: Nike undergoing 'Win Now' restructuring, cutting ~1,400 jobs amid disappointing sales and margin pressures, particularly in Greater China. Stock trading ~$44.35, down significantly from 2021 peak. CEO Elliott Hill and Apple CEO Tim Cook both made share purchases. New sneaker releases scheduled for May including Zoom Hyperflight on May 22.
